creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 173139
svn diff for databases/mariadb101-server

From the MariaDB documentation found on https://mariadb.com/kb/en/mariadb/getting-started-with-mariadb-galera-cluster/ to make replication work, we need to add some flags when compiling.
> -DWITH_WSREP=ON -DWITH_INNODB_DISALLOW_WRITES=1

This patch adds Galera as an option which defaults to ON
